prompt:
A small wooden birdhouse with a pitched roof hangs from a sturdy branch or simple metal hook, its single round entrance hole centered on the front face above a tiny perch. The wood is unfinished or lightly stained, with visible grain and a simple rectangular body that looks hand-built rather than ornate. In the background, soft greenery and a hint of a backyard fence suggest that this is meant for common backyard birds to use as a shelter and nesting spot.

The scene is set in a near-future solarpunk backyard with lush plants, soft natural light, and perhaps a glimpse of solar panels or rainwater collection in the distance. The 512×512 image is photorealistic with gentle stylization, no logos or text, and a composition that keeps the birdhouse clearly in focus while the rest of the yard and garden fades into a pleasant, slightly blurred backdrop.
